Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Frozen Blade school]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 9''' — The Frozen Blade school is a group.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 1''' — The Frozen Blade School is a school that Adama remembers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 5''' — Members of the Frozen Blade School were aboard the Akura cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The headquarters of the Frozen Blade sect is located in the snow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — The Frozen Blade School owns a huge stretch of land and protects people from invaders and the environment.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 8''' — Only Truegolds on the Path of the Frozen Blade are allowed to visit the Sage's home.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — The Frozen Blade School has members on the Akura backup team.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 11''' — The Frozen Blade School protects a snowy village.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — The Frozen Blade School assigns members to protect civilians from Remnants or aura-storms.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
